message.content:
@startuml
actor Administrator

participant ":Main UI" as MainUI
participant ":ImportReadingsFromFileUI" as ImportUI
participant ":ImportReadingsFromFileController" as ImportController
participant ":ListOfGeographicArea" as ListGeoArea
participant "reader:XmlReader" as XmlReader

Administrator <- ImportUI : Request file path
Administrator -> ImportUI : file path
ImportUI -> ImportController : addReadingsToSensors(reader,path)
activate ImportController
ImportController -> XmlReader : importReadingsOfSensor(path)
activate XmlReader
ImportController <-- XmlReader : listOfReadingsDto
deactivate XmlReader
ImportController -> ListGeoArea : getAllSensors( )
activate ListGeoArea
ImportController <-- ListGeoArea : listOfAreaSensors
deactivate ListGeoArea
ImportController <-- ImportController : setReadingsBySensorIDescription( )
ImportUI <-- ImportController : number of lines added
deactivate ImportController
Administrator <-- ImportUI : number of lines added

@enduml
